mapper.sql: SELECT o.*, p.title AS product_title, (SELECT pi.image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_cover = 1 LIMIT 1) AS product_cover, su.nickname AS seller_nickname, su.avatar AS seller_avatar, bu.nickname AS buyer_nickname, bu.avatar AS buyer_avatar, a.receiver_name, a.receiver_phone, CONCAT(a.province, a.city, IFNULL(a.district,''), a.detail_address) AS full_address FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` su ON o.seller_id = su.id LEFT JOIN `user` bu ON o.buyer_id = bu.id LEFT JOIN user_address a ON o.address_id = a.id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info (order_no, product_id, seller_id, buyer_id, address_id, price, trade_mode, order_status, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{productId}, #{sellerId}, #{buyerId}, #{addressId}, #{price}, #{tradeMode}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE order_info
order_status = #{orderStatus}, pay_time = #{payTime}, ship_time = #{shipTime}, receive_time = #{receiveTime}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, address_id = #{addressId},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE order_info SET order_status = #{orderStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND (buyer_id = #{userId} OR seller_id = #{userId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND order_status = #{orderStatus}
